sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99899" key="sunekblu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-βλύζω</orth>, <sense id="n99899.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spirt out together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
